Biokoma Cistus incanus offers a rich source of polyphenols, bioflavonoids, catechins, gallic acid, rutin and other beneficial bioactive compounds. Bullet Point 2: Ingredients: USDA Certified Organic Cistus Incanus Bullet Point 3: Preparation and Dosage: In a cup add 1 tea bag, pour boiling water, brew covered for about 8-10 minutes, strain it and drink it regularly throughout the day.
